scan_sequence.action: Extracted B7-H4, TF, and Nectin-4 expression and mechanism evidence from 847 source documents
Mapped 18 active, 4 completed, and 3 discontinued ADC studies across all 3 candidates
Identified endpoint precedent, label comparators, and accelerated approval pathways
Estimated patient populations, market sizing, and competitive saturation indices
Evaluated payload class compatibility, DAR optimization, and linker chemistry fit for each target
Cross-referenced 23 prior ADC failure archetypes; flagged 6 active warnings across 3 candidates
Ran pathway proximity, druggability, and structure availability checks via BioNeMo plausibility layer
Synthesized cross-functional thesis and generated diligence memos for all 3 candidates
